jobs.description: We are a Kenyan Faith-based beauty firm that is seeking a digital-savvy Customer Care, Social Media Manager and E-Commerce Manager. We shall be kicking off in June with a powerful campaign, therefore the contract will officially begin in June and we will use May to meet, prepare and orient the candidate on the role. He/She will manage our day-to-day online presence, customer interactions, and e-commerce operations on Shopify. The fee is a total of $800 paid in 4 milestones for about 4 months beginning June 1st, 2026 ($200 x 4 monthly). This role is ideal for someone who is highly organized, customer-focused, digitally switched on and comfortable working across social media, online sales, and customer communication. CUSTOMER CARE & E-COMMERCE SUPPORT: * Beautifully set up and manage WhatsApp Business with product photos for customer care * Manage customer inquiries and support across Email, Instagram DMs, WhatsApp, Shopify, and customer care phone (Company customer care phone will be provided) * Manage Shopify backend orders and basic website operations * Respond professionally to inquiries, complaints, refunds, exchanges, missing orders, and high-emotion customer situations * Handle fulfillment, order tracking, delivery follow-ups and coordination with logistics partners * Regularly call and liaise with retail partners to ensure orders are processed and fulfilled correctly * Organize customer conversations, support tickets, and WhatsApp Business communication * Work closely with the Accounts, Operations & Admin Manager to oversee invoicing, checkout and order deliveries * Provide excellent customer care hence satisfaction and retention, for both our retail and B2C customers. SOCIAL MEDIA MANAGEMENT * Receive ready-made creative content to post and manage on the social media Business page & Instagram shop. (IG only) * Schedule and maintain the social media content calendar and posting diary (content provided) * Monitor and respond to all comments, DMs and WhatsApp Business in a timely and professional manner * Use iPhone to post high-quality content on social media. (Company social media iPhone will be provided.) SKILLS & EXPERIENCE: - Shopify customer support - E-commerce and beauty/lifestyle brands - Social media community management - Order management and fulfillment systems - A genuine care for customers and the brand - Strong professional communication, responsive and reliable. - A good-spirited, vibrant and eager employee with a willingness to grow. - Interest in faith, beauty or the media industry is a plus! We shall send/give the candidate a complimentary package of the beauty products to experience it themselves! We shall then also train the candidate on the products so they will be very familiar with it as they handle customer queries. This position has the potential to be long-term if the service is found to meet and surpass our expectations. If this sounds like you, please do apply!
jobs.title: Customer Support & Social Media Manager for Beauty E-commerce Brand (Shopify)

jobs.description: We are a rapidly growing luxury ecommerce brand seeking an AI-forward operations integrator to help optimize and connect the systems that support our business operations. jobs.description: We are a multi-brand Muslim lifestyle business with a live Shopify store. We are growing fast and need a senior e-commerce operator to own our sales channel growth across Shopify, Amazon, and TikTok Shop. This is a full-time ongoing role. You report directly to the CEO. --- WHAT YOU WILL OWN Shopify — Conversion rate optimisation and AOV growth — Bundle, upsell, and cross-sell strategy — Product page improvements (copy, structure, social proof) — Weekly performance reporting Amazon — Full setup and launch of our brands on Seller Central — Listing optimisation and A+ content — PPC campaign management (profitable growth, not just visibility) — 3PL and FBA logistics coordination TikTok Shop — Setup and management of our TikTok Shop presence — Affiliate and creator activation within the Muslim lifestyle space — Repeatable launch playbook for new products --- WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR You are right for this role if: ✓ You have scaled at least one DTC brand past 7 figures on Shopify, show us the numbers ✓ You have managed Amazon PPC profitably and understand ACoS vs TACoS ✓ You have activated TikTok Shop affiliates and can speak to what worked ✓ You have a genuine, deep understanding of the Muslim community ✓ You understand 3PL and FBA logistics, not just the marketing side ✓ You think in margin and contribution, not just traffic This is not the role for you if: ✗ You need day-to-day direction ✗ Your background is primarily social media management or VA work ✗ You have certifications without commercial results to back them ✗ You are not familiar with the Muslim community
jobs.title: Head of E-commerce & Sales Growth: Shopify, Amazon, TikTok Shop (Muslim Lifestyle Brand)

jobs.description: About the Brand I run Salty Shenanigans Apparel, a humor‑driven coastal lifestyle shirt brand. We’re growing fast and need a senior ecommerce specialist to optimize our Klaviyo, CRO, SRO, and Google Shopping/Search setup. This is NOT a full ad‑management role. This is a technical + strategic optimization project. Project Scope 1. Klaviyo Audit + Optimization (Flows Already Built) All flows are already created — I need a senior Klaviyo expert to audit and optimize them. Audit Requirements: - Deliverability check - Segmentation review - Flow logic + timing review - Template QC - SMS compliance - Signup form audit - Shopify event sync verification Implementation (Tweaks Only): - Fix issues found in audit - Improve segmentation - Adjust triggers + timing - Improve subject lines + preheaders - Add A/B tests - Light copy optimization - Improve SMS logic 2. CRO (Conversion Rate Optimization) Improve the shopping experience and increase conversion rate. Deliverables: - Review product pages (PDPs) - Improve layout, hierarchy, and trust elements - Recommend AOV‑boosting tactics - Optimize mobile experience - Improve add‑to‑cart flow - Optimize popups + SMS/email capture 3. SRO (Search Revenue Optimization) + Google Setup Set up and optimize Google Shopping + Google Search for high‑intent traffic. Deliverables: - Google Merchant Center setup or cleanup - Product feed optimization - Google Shopping campaign setup - Google Search campaign setup - Basic retargeting setup - Tracking verification (Shopify → Google) - Ensure all conversions fire correctly This is setup only, not ongoing management. 4. (Optional) UGC Creative Direction If you have experience with UGC strategy: - 10–20 UGC concepts - Hooks + CTAs - Humor‑driven angles - Shot lists - Thumbnail/overlay text direction What Success Looks Like - Higher Klaviyo revenue (goal: 25–40%) - Better deliverability + open/click rates - Higher onsite conversion rate - Google Shopping/Search driving profitable traffic - Clean tracking + optimized product feed - Stronger email/SMS segmentation Required Experience - Senior‑level ecommerce specialist - Apparel/ecommerce experience required - Klaviyo expert (flows, segmentation, deliverability) - Shopify CRO experience - Google Shopping + Search setup experience - Strong analytical + technical skills - Ability to match a humor‑driven coastal brand voice Preferred Qualifications - Experience scaling apparel brands - Experience with SRO frameworks - Experience optimizing Shopify themes - Strong understanding of mobile UX To Apply, Please Send: 1. Short intro 2. Apparel brands you’ve worked with 3. Klaviyo audits or optimizations you’ve done 4. Google Shopping/Search setups you’ve done 5. CRO examples or case studies 6. Your pricing for: - Klaviyo audit + tweaks - CRO improvements - Google Shopping/Search setup - (Optional) UGC creative direction
jobs.title: Senior Ecommerce Specialist Needed: Klaviyo Audit + CRO + SRO + Google Setup for Apparel Brand

jobs.description: G'day — we're Frankster 🩳 We're Australia's fastest-growing men's shorts brand. We launched 2 years ago and doing around AU$250k/month in revenue, with 3,000+ five-star reviews and a loyal following of blokes (and their gift-giving partners) across Australia. Our long-time freelance email designer has moved on, and we're looking for the next person (or small agency) to take the reins on our email channel and help us grow it. The Role You'll own our entire Klaviyo program end-to-end. We're not looking for someone to "help out" — we want a steady, reliable partner who can run this channel like it's their own. Your responsibilities: - Weekly campaign emails; Plan, design, copywrite, build, and schedule one campaign per week to our subscriber list. You'll own the calendar, the angles & the segmentation. The final send will be done by us. - Flow optimization; All our core flows are already built (welcome, abandoned cart, browse abandonment, post-purchase, win-back, etc.). Your job is to audit, test, and continuously improve them — better subject lines, smarter segmentation, refreshed creative, A/B testing, and reporting on what's working. - Peak-period campaigns; Build out additional campaign series for high-leverage periods: Black Friday / Cyber Monday, End of Season Sale, Father's Day, Boxing Day, and other key Australian retail moments. - Reporting; Monthly performance reports on campaign and flow KPIs (open rate, CTR, CVR, revenue per recipient, list growth) with clear recommendations on what to test next. - List health; Maintain deliverability, manage suppression lists, and monitor sender reputation. Must-Haves - 3+ years hands-on Klaviyo experience (please don't apply if Klaviyo is new to you) - Proven track record managing email for DTC ecommerce brands — apparel/fashion experience is a strong plus - Strong copywriting skills with the ability to match a cheeky, casual, Aussie brand voice - Email design skills (ideally also use of Fimga) - Solid understanding of segmentation, A/B testing, and email deliverability - Ability to work independently and stick to deadlines without hand-holding - Reliable communication Nice-to-Haves - Experience scaling email revenue for brands in the AU$200k–AU$1M+/month range - Shopify experience (that's our platform) - Familiarity with men's apparel, lifestyle, or sports/active brands - Background in BFCM campaign planning for ecommerce What We Offer - Long-term, ongoing engagement; we want to find someone for the long haul, not a one-off project - A growing brand with strong fundamentals (5%+ conversion rate, solid product-market fit, big BFCM ahead) - Creative freedom to bring ideas, angles, and tests to the table - A founder who actually responds to messages and gives clear feedback - Clear scope, clear expectations, fair pay How to Apply — Please Read Carefully ⚠️ - To be considered, you must apply through Upwork. Applications received via email, website contact form, Instagram DMs, LinkedIn, or any other channel will be marked as spam and ignored. No exceptions. In your Upwork proposal, please include: - A short intro (3–5 sentences); who you are and why this role fits - Your Klaviyo experience; how long, how many brands, account sizes you've worked with - 2–3 examples of campaigns or flows you've built (screenshots, links, or case studies) - One result you're proud of; a specific number that shows your impact (e.g. lifted abandoned cart revenue by X%, grew email's revenue share from X% to Y%) - Your weekly availability and your rate (hourly or monthly retainer — whichever you prefer) We review every proposal that follows the brief above. Looking forward to hearing from you.
jobs.title: Long-Term Klaviyo Email Manager Wanted for Fast-Growing AU DTC Brand

Important: We already have separate Shopify/CRO and SEO specialists working on: * technical SEO, * indexing, * Shopify structure, * CRO, * and organic growth. This role is specifically for: Meta Ads, Facebook Business Manager, audience strategy, tracking, retargeting, verification, and paid traffic optimization. We are looking for someone highly experienced with: * Meta Business Manager * Facebook & Instagram Ads * Meta Pixel setup * Conversions API * Shopify integration * Domain verification * Meta business verification * Event tracking * Retargeting strategy * Audience building * Luxury/high-ticket customer targeting * Catalog ads * Creative testing * Ad account structure * Scaling premium brands * ROAS optimization * Analytics & reporting Our brand is positioned in the luxury/avant-garde fashion space, so understanding premium customer psychology and high-end branding is extremely important. We are NOT looking for: * generic low-level ad management, * mass-market fast-fashion strategies, * or spam-style traffic approaches. Goals: * Improve Meta infrastructure and account stability * Build high-quality luxury audiences * Improve conversion tracking * Create sustainable paid traffic systems * Assist with Meta verification * Support long-term scaling strategy * Develop retargeting systems * Improve ad efficiency and performance Please send: * Relevant Meta ad case studies * Fashion/luxury brands you’ve worked with * ROAS examples * Experience with high-ticket products * Your approach to Meta ads in 2026 * Your experience with Shopify and tracking setup Bonus if experienced with: * Google/YouTube ads * Klaviyo * Creative strategy * Luxury fashion/e-commerce brands Long-term opportunity for the right person.

jobs.description: Shopify Chargeback & Dispute Manager Needed (E-commerce/Fashion) We are hiring an experienced Chargeback & Dispute Manager for our growing Shopify fashion e-commerce brand. Your role will focus on handling, disputing, and preventing chargebacks across multiple payment platforms including Shopify Payments, Stripe, PayPal, Klarna, Airwallex, Oceanpayment, and merchant portals. We are looking for someone who understands chargeback management deeply and can professionally respond to disputes with organized evidence and strong case-building skills. About The Role You will be responsible for resolving cardholder disputes efficiently and fairly while helping reduce revenue loss and protect the health of our payment processors. You must understand different chargeback types including: Product Not Received Product Unacceptable Fraudulent Transactions Credit Not Processed Unrecognized Charges Subscription Canceled General Chargebacks Responsibilities Handle daily chargeback and dispute cases Review disputes inside Shopify, Stripe, PayPal, Klarna, Airwallex, etc. Contact customers to encourage direct resolution before escalation Collect and organize evidence for each case Prepare professional dispute responses Upload supporting documentation before deadlines Monitor fraud trends and suspicious activity Track dispute outcomes and reporting Help reduce overall chargeback ratio Required Skills & Experience Proven experience handling e-commerce chargebacks Experience with Shopify Payments, Stripe, PayPal Resolution Center, Klarna Merchant Portal, Airwallex, or similar Strong English communication and writing skills Ability to compile detailed evidence packages Experience with order tracking and fulfillment verification Understanding of fraud prevention and risk management Strong organizational skills and attention to detail Important You should know how to build complete dispute evidence files including: Order confirmations Transaction details Proof of shipment & delivery Customer communication history Refund & return policies Screenshots and supporting attachments You must be able to present cases professionally and clearly to payment processors and issuing banks. Preferred Experience Shopify fashion/e-commerce brands High-volume stores Fraud analysis tools Chargeflow, Signifyd, NoFraud, Gorgias, Disputifier, etc. To Apply Please send: Your experience with chargebacks/disputes Payment platforms you’ve worked with Your average dispute win rate Examples of successful disputes you handled Your weekly availability To confirm you fully read this job post, include the word “strawberry” at the top of your application.
jobs.title: Shopify Chargeback & Dispute Manager Needed (E-commerce/Fashion)

We are building a long-term authority brand with a strong focus on trust, education, customer experience, and technical SEO. Current Situation: • Google Merchant Center account suspended • Previous appeal attempts have already been used no more attempts from my end • Need someone who deeply understands Google policies, diagnostics, technical trust signals, and recovery strategies • Looking for someone experienced, strategic, and honest about what is realistically possible We ARE looking for someone who can: • Audit our entire website and GMC setup • Identify all possible trust and policy issues Ideal Candidate: • Proven experience recovering suspended Google Merchant Center accounts • Strong understanding of Misrepresentation policy • Advanced Shopify experience • Technical SEO knowledge • Experience with Google Search Console and indexing issues • Experience with wellness, health, or high-ticket e-commerce brands is a bonus • Strong communication skills and transparent process When applying, please include: Similar GMC suspension recovery projects you have worked on What type of suspensions you resolved Your general approach to diagnosing issues Any examples/case studies/results We are looking for someone long-term if the fit is right.

jobs.description: We're hiring a senior Shopify developer to build the bundle product pages and gift flow for None Better — a precision consumer goods brand launching at myduggie.com. About the project Three product bundles ("The Pair," "The Complete Carry," "The Home Kit") sold as configurable sets where customers pick colors per item. Two purchase paths from each bundle page: standard self-buy, or "give as a gift" — a flow where the recipient picks the colors at redemption, with personal notes from the gifter and a thank-you note that closes the loop. Stack: Shopify Horizon theme, Klaviyo (21 email templates already built), Shopify Search & Discovery, Shopify Functions for cart and shipping logic, Rubik for product image swatches. Scope 8 visual pages: 3 bundle product pages (configurator-driven), 1 collection page, 4 gift flow pages (gift checkout, review, recipient bundle, thank you note). Plus backend: * Cart logic (constituent items, bundle tagging, bundle-specific free shipping) * Sitewide shipping logic via Shopify Function (admin-configurable rates per product type — accessories tier, Lil' Duggie tier, free over threshold). Rates editable in admin without code changes. * Native gift email suppression + Shopify default email customization * 2 Klaviyo flows wired with conditional splits, send-to overrides, and conditional show/hide rules across 21 templates * Back-in-stock infrastructure (custom product page section showing admin-configurable restock date + email capture, Klaviyo flow wiring) You'll architect the foundation: Color metaobject schema, theme tokens, reusable components (color picker built around Rubik / metaobject reference_image), state management approach. We have visual mockups for all 8 pages and a comprehensive build guide. Architecture is yours to propose. Engagement structure — read carefully The first milestone is a paid test. We'll select 3 candidates, all of whom will build the same page (The Pair) at $400. After review, 1 candidate is selected to complete the rest of the project. The other 2 are paid for their work and the engagement ends there. 13 milestones total at $400–$1,000 each. Total project: $7,000 ($6,200 to the chosen developer). All page milestones: $400. Backend milestones: $400–$1,000. Target completion: July 15, 2026. Roughly 5–7 weeks of work after candidate selection. Required experience * Upwork Top Rated or Top Rated Plus * Demonstrated Shopify Horizon theme work (live storefront links, not screenshots) * Configurator state-management experience — products with multi-item color/option pickers using line item properties * Klaviyo: custom event triggers, conditional show/hide on event properties, flow setup with conditional splits, send-to overrides * Shopify Functions experience (Delivery Customizations for shipping logic) * Clear written communication How we work Code review process: developer ships pieces, we review them together (founder plus AI collaborator) before milestones close. Storefront testing across all color combinations and flow scenarios. Honest feedback both ways. We push back when we disagree, and we expect you to push back when you disagree. Yes-to-everything is a red flag. To apply, include: 1. Live storefront links demonstrating multi-item configurators 2. A short paragraph on your architecture approach: how you'd structure the Color metaobject, where state lives in the gift checkout flow, how you'd handle the recipient → order creation 3. Any questions about the scope We'll respond within 48 hours. Shortlisted candidates receive the full build guide, mockups, and a kickoff call before the test milestone begins.
jobs.title: Shopify Horizon Developer — Bundle Configurator + Gift Flow + Klaviyo

jobs.description: We are looking for a highly motivated and results-driven Sales Specialist to join our team at S3DA Design. In this role, you will strictly be working with warm leads and Marketing Qualified Leads (MQLs) that have already shown interest in our services. No cold calling is required. Your primary objective will be to engage with these inbound prospects, understand their project needs, communicate our value, and close the deal. Key Responsibilities: Lead Conversion: Promptly follow up with warm leads and MQLs via phone, email, or video call. Consultative Selling: Conduct discovery conversations to understand the client's specific requirements and guide them toward the right solution. Pipeline Management: Track all interactions, update deal stages, and maintain detailed notes within our CRM (HubSpot). Follow-Up: Implement consistent and professional follow-up strategies for leads that need more time to make a decision. Closing Deals: Negotiate terms when necessary, send out proposals/invoices, and successfully convert prospects into paying clients. Requirements: Proven track record in B2B sales, specifically in closing warm, inbound leads. Experience using CRM platforms (HubSpot experience is highly preferred). Excellent written and verbal communication English skills. Ability to learn technical service offerings quickly to speak confidently with potential clients. Strong follow-up skills and a persistent, but professional, closing mentality. To Apply: Please submit your proposal detailing your experience closing inbound leads. Include a brief example of your average closing rate and the types of services or products you have successfully sold in the past. We will start with a trial period to gauge conversion rates and CRM management before moving to a long-term agreement.
jobs.title: Inbound Sales Closer (Warm Leads / MQLs)

Potential for ongoing monthly work Flexible and easy communication Opportunity to grow with a fashion eCommerce brand Clear instructions and organized workflow To Apply, Please Send: Examples of Shopify stores you’ve worked on Share SEO-Based Listing Methods and Strategies to Attract More Customers Estimated turnaround time Your rate per product or per upload project We’re looking for someone dependable, fast, and detail-oriented who can help us keep our Shopify fashion store organized and ready to scale.

jobs.description: Looking for AMAZING outgoing, detail oriented, and experienced EA/VA for Operations & Marketing Role We’re a fast-growing, heart-led brand looking for a strategic, creative, and organized Operations and Marketing Assistant/EA to join us on our mission. Who You Are: Super organized with top-notch communication skills (written & verbal!) A Microsoft Office whiz and tech-savvy to the max A team player who LOVES collaborating with others Independent, detail-obsessed, and always one step ahead A creative, out-of-the-box thinker with strong follow-through Curious about health, education, community, or mission-driven brands Able to work efficiently in a fast-paced, high-growth environment What You’ll Do Project & Workflow -Coordinate team check-ins, SOPs, and campaign handoffs B2B Relationship Support -Help maintain relationships with hospital gift shops, schools, museums, and nonprofit partners -Assist in sending proposals, order confirmations, invoices, and follow-up comms -Support bulk order logistics, co-branded projects, and light CRM management Operations & Ecommerce Management -Manage daily operations of the our Shopify store—including product updates, inventory, and fulfillment coordination -Troubleshoot order or shipping issues and liaise with warehouse and logistics partners -Refresh product listings, bundles, and promotional content in alignment with marketing initiatives Customer Experience & Support -Respond to customer emails and messages with empathy, kindness, and a touch of humor as our “Chief Happiness Officer” -Track and resolve customer concerns, reviews, and Shopify issues with efficiency and care -Flag trends, gaps, or opportunities to improve CX touchpoints and DTC flow Executive & Administrative Support -Provide support to the CEO with inbox sorting, meeting prep, scheduling, and internal communications -Assist with vendor coordination, onboarding docs, and miscellaneous admin tasks Be the calm, capable go-to person who keeps operations flowing smoothly Marketing & Strategy (this is a plus if you have experience) -Help plan and execute strategic, seasonal, and mission-driven email campaigns using Klaviyo -Draft engaging subject lines, preview text, and copy in the brand voice -Support monthly email themes, health awareness tie-ins, product drops, and gifting moment -Monitor performance metrics (open rates, CTRs, conversions) and suggest improvements Bonus Points If You Have -Experience with Klaviyo, Canva, Metricool, or Slack, Google jobs.description: Subject: ROYAL7 – Shopify Developer Needed for VIP Client Project Hello, I’m currently managing a premium Shopify project for one of my VIP clients who is ready to start immediately. Reference website: https://www.maxikit.com Goal: Build a similar structure but with better UX, cleaner architecture, faster loading speed, and fully optimized mobile performance. Main Features Required: ✅ Fully custom Shopify 2.0 theme ✅ Liquid + Vanilla JS + Modern CSS ✅ Football / NBA / NFL / Vintage / Jackets categories ✅ Jersey personalization (name + number) ✅ Advanced product filtering ✅ Mega menu with images ✅ Dynamic cart drawer with upsells ✅ Wishlist + Quick View + Compare ✅ FOMO features (stock alerts, recent sales, countdowns) ✅ Free shipping progress bar ✅ Interactive size guide modal ✅ Custom homepage sections ✅ Mobile-first responsive development ✅ 90+ Google PageSpeed score NO PREBUILT THEMES OR APPS. Project Conditions: 💰 Budget approved: $10,000 USD ⏱ Deadline: 7 days maximum 📦 Assets and product content already provided 🤝 Potential long-term collaboration after delivery Workflow: Developer profile validation Quick technical/video call Contract + project kickoff Daily progress updates + staging previews Final delivery → client validation → payment release The client is specifically looking for someone: available immediately, able to work full-time for 7 consecutive days, experienced in custom Shopify development, and capable of delivering premium-quality work. Please reply with: 2-3 custom Shopify projects you built Your availability to start Confirmation of 7-day availability Your timezone IMPORTANT: Please include “ROYAL7” in your reply subject to confirm you read the full message.

jobs.description: We are BocaBella (bocabella.com), a fast-growing, premium professional teeth whitening brand. Our patented U-Wrap system replaces 30-year-old messy whitening technology. By infusing our formula with Nano-Hydroxyapatite (nHAp), we deliver clinical-grade results (up to 25 shades whiter in 14 days) with absolutely zero harsh sensitivity. We already have strong traction on TikTok Shop and Amazon, and a robust B2B wholesale channel. Now, we are looking for a highly analytical and experienced Google Ads Manager to scale our direct-to-consumer (D2C) website sales profitably. What You Will Do: You will take full ownership of our Google Ads account. Your primary goal is to drive high-converting traffic to our site, scale our daily spend, and maintain a highly profitable ROAS. Campaign Strategy & Execution: Build, manage, and scale Search, Performance Max (PMax), and Google Shopping campaigns. Optimization: Relentlessly monitor and optimize bids, search terms, negative keywords, and audience signals to drive down CPA. Competitor Targeting: Build aggressive search campaigns targeting competitors in the space (Opalescence, Crest, Lumineux, etc.). Tracking & Analytics: Ensure GA4, Google Tag Manager, and conversion tracking are firing perfectly so we have 100% accurate data attribution. (Optional - Keep if applicable): B2B Lead Gen: Run targeted search campaigns to capture dental practice owners searching for professional wholesale whitening systems. Requirements: Proven track record of managing and scaling Google Ads for D2C e-commerce brands (experience in health, beauty, cosmetics, or dental is a massive plus). Deep expertise in Performance Max (PMax) and Google Shopping feed optimization. You are highly analytical. You make decisions based on data, not guesses. You understand landing page conversion rate optimization (CRO) and can tell us if our landing pages need tweaking to convert your traffic better. Fluent English for writing compelling, high-converting Search Ad copy. To Apply, Please Include: To ensure you read this post and are a good fit for our brand, please reply with the following: A brief overview of an e-commerce brand you scaled using Google Ads (Please include the niche, the ad spend you managed, and the ROAS you achieved). What is your initial strategy for a premium-priced product competing against cheaper legacy brands on Google Search/Shopping?
jobs.title: Expert Google Ads Manager (E-commerce / ROAS Focused) for Premium Dental

jobs.description: Shopify set up for wash, dry and fold business. Brief: We need a competent Shopify professional to assist in setting up an online store for us with the sole function of booking free laundry pick up dates for home and business locations in Queenstown, New Zealand. We already run a commercial and physical laundry processing location but are looking to extend our services by offering free pick up and delivery for our domestic customers. We already have a domain name registered laundrydirect.co.nz (Godaddy) and a Shopify account established. We are looking for a competent shopify expert to assist us in speeding up our launch date by completing most of the shopify set-up required. What is needed: • Theme tuning including home page image addition, layout changes and the input and successful implementation of design for our content in mobile and desktop views. All content and images will be supplied. • The sole function of the online store is to serve as a booking location for laundry pick up from private homes and business in the Queenstown region. So it is a simple site but must function practically for customers. We need a product in the inventory which offers free laundry free pick ups for customers on Monday and Tuesday’s between 8am and 5pm on said days. (Delivery will be Wednesday (for Monday pick up) and Thursday (for Tuesday Pick-up but this will be handled via zapier, xero and shipday). We have selected Pickeasy as a shopify app to assist in this functionality. (allows for blackout dates and number of pickups available per day) Total pick-ups per day will first be limited to 15. Fiverr expert to establish product and Pickeasy functionality. • Customers should be able to add comments to the pick up order • The creation of a How it works – info to be supplied, layout and design required • The creation of a Pricing page, info supplied, layout and design required • Creation o f a T&C’s page, content supplied, layout and design required. • Creation of a Contact page, layout and design required • Removal of all other unrelated functionality from the generic shopify theme • There is no need for payment services in shopify as the service is free – customers will be invoiced for their laundry via Xero and pay via Xero POLI and CC - We checkin and itemise all items at our processing plant, then invoice via email. • Our aim is to have a simple “shop” with focused singularity in relation to easy pick up ordering only.
jobs.title: Laundry Direct Queenstown

jobs.description: Project Overview: I am launching a wholesale business. I have the domain, but I need a simple, high-converting website built from scratch. The primary goal is lead generation: I want businesses/customers to find the site via SEO, view our product catalog, and contact us for wholesale pricing. We are based in California and want to rank locally first, with the ability to scale for out-of-state customers. Key Requirements: Wholesale Catalog Layout: A clean, organized product showcase that allows users to browse model numbers and specs without a traditional retail checkout. Lead Generation: Optimized contact forms and "Request a Quote" buttons that are easy to find and use. SEO Optimization: The site must be built for speed and technical SEO. Spam & Security Hardening: I need a "zero-spam" setup. This includes invisible bot protection, a hardened login area, and automated backups. Scalability: The backend must be user-friendly so I can easily add more products and categories to the catalog as we expand. Technical Preferences: Platform: WordPress is preferred for SEO flexibility, but I am open to Shopify if you can demonstrate a strong B2B/Lead-Gen use case. Security: Setup of Cloudflare, SSL, and anti-spam plugins is mandatory. Clean Code: No "bloated" themes that slow down the site.
jobs.title: Web Developer for Wholesale Distribution Website B2B

jobs.description: I’m looking for someone to help grow and optimize my online coaching and educational brand through SEO, content strategy, and digital marketing. Communication and transparency are very important to me. I prefer measurable goals, clear reporting, and practical recommendations I can actually implement. Please include: * Examples of Shopify SEO work * Experience growing expert/personal brands * Relevant health/fitness/wellness projects * What strategies you think would work best for my brand specifically

jobs.description: Website: www.northstardash.com We’re looking for a highly resourceful and motivated SDR / lead generation partner to help grow NorthStarDash — a modern analytics and performance dashboard platform built for businesses that rely on marketing data to make decisions. Our ideal customers are Shopify and DTC ecommerce brands, business owners actively running Facebook and Google Ads, agencies, and operators who need clearer visibility into performance, attribution, profitability, and growth metrics. This is not a “spray and pray” outreach role. We want someone who can identify real opportunities, start conversations naturally, and connect us with businesses that genuinely need better reporting and analytics infrastructure. This is a commission-only role with uncapped upside. The goal is to sell packages for hundreds to thousands, but you would not need to do the selling, you are just trying to find the leads. You will earn a lifetime revenue share (as in every month they stay on board, you get commission) on the leads you help bring in that end up converting, meaning the better the leads and relationships you generate, the more you can earn long term. We are specifically looking for someone hungry, persistent, and creative — someone willing to grind through free and low-cost lead sources such as Facebook groups, LinkedIn, online communities, directories, Reddit, cold outreach, and other unconventional channels to uncover strong-fit prospects. You should be comfortable independently finding leads, qualifying them, and opening conversations that can convert into demos and paying clients. The ideal candidate understands the ecommerce and digital marketing space, knows how to spot businesses spending on paid media, and can communicate professionally with founders, operators, and marketing teams. Experience with lead generation, SDR work, appointment setting, ecommerce, media buying, or SaaS outreach is a plus, but hustle and resourcefulness matter more than formal experience. If you are someone who enjoys building pipelines from scratch and wants to directly participate in the revenue you help create, we’d love to talk.

jobs.description: I’m looking for an experienced Shopify Technical SEO specialist to review and improve the SEO foundation of my ecommerce store: Website: happylittlepaws.de Happy Little Paws is a German pet products ecommerce brand targeting customers in Germany. The goal is not aggressive backlink building or generic SEO packages. I’m looking for a clean, safe, and structured technical SEO audit and implementation plan. Main areas I need help with: * Shopify technical SEO cleanup * Google Search Console review * Crawl and indexation issues * Product and organisation schema * Internal linking structure * Collection and product page SEO structure * Commercial keyword alignment for the German market * SERP feature readiness where possible Important context: The store is in German, so any visible German wording, product titles, headings, or customer-facing copy should not be changed directly without review. I’m mainly looking for technical SEO support, structure improvements, and clear recommendations. For the first milestone, I would prefer a safe and controlled starting point, such as: * Technical SEO audit * Google Search Console review * Schema and indexing check * Internal linking recommendations * Priority action plan for the most important fixes Please explain in your proposal: 1. How you would approach the first technical SEO audit 2. What access you would need 3. Whether you have experience with Shopify ecommerce stores 4. How you would handle a German ecommerce store 5. What you recommend as a safe first milestone 6. Whether you would start with audit only or audit + implementation I’m looking for someone who works carefully, documents changes clearly, and does not make major visual, design, theme, or customer-facing content changes without approval.

jobs.description: We are is a B2B digital marketing agency serving 30+ local retail clients, including one multi-location account with 9 locations. Our services include SEO, custom website development, and technical infrastructure (Cloudflare Workers, reverse proxies, structured data injection). We need senior-level help, not foundational SEO advice. The Problem We have accumulated four overlapping SEO and reporting tools (SearchAtlas, SE Ranking, Ahrefs, AgencyAnalytics) without clear decisions on which is the source of truth for what. Our client reporting has become inconsistent. We do not have a documented standard for what we track, what we report, or how we present results to clients. We need one senior SEO expert who can both make the strategic calls AND execute the build. We are not looking for a strategist who hands us a deck and disappears, and we are not looking for an implementer who waits to be told what to do. We need someone who can walk into our stack, make the right decisions, and then build the system themselves. Scope of Work This is a single engagement covering both strategy and execution. Phase 1: Audit and Strategy (Week 1) Audit our existing tool stack (SearchAtlas, SE Ranking, Ahrefs, AgencyAnalytics) and recommend which to keep and which to cancel, with specific reasoning. Define a client reporting standard: what metrics we track, what we report to clients monthly, what we keep internal. Include exact metric definitions and source-of-truth assignments. Define a keyword tracking framework: how many keywords per client, how they are categorized (branded, local, product, competitive, stretch), and how progress is measured. Present recommendations to our two co-founders in a 60-minute strategy call. We sign off before you move to Phase 2. Phase 2: Build (Weeks 2 to 4) Set up the chosen reporting tool under our agency branding (logo, colors, sender domain. Build a master client report template covering the metrics defined in Phase 1. Configure all 30 client accounts with the correct data source connections (GSC, GA4, GBP, Ahrefs or chosen rank tracker). Special handling for our 9-location client: aggregate location-level GBP data into one rolled-up brand view with optional location-level drilldowns. Configure automated monthly delivery to client email addresses we provide, scheduled for the same day each month. Migrate or export historical rank tracking data from any tools being cancelled before they are turned off. Phase 3: Handoff (Week 4) Loom video walkthroughs (max 20 minutes total) covering how to update templates, add new clients, swap data sources, and troubleshoot common issues. Written handoff document covering the reporting standard, keyword framework, and tool stack decisions. 60-minute handoff call with our co-founders. Required Experience Minimum 7 years in agency-side SEO, with at least 3 years in a senior strategist or leadership role Direct experience building client reporting systems for multi-client agencies (not just in-house SEO) Strong local SEO and Google Business Profile reporting experience Hands-on build experience with at least three of: SearchAtlas, SE Ranking, Ahrefs, AgencyAnalytics, Whatagraph, DashThis, Looker Studio Multi-location client reporting experience (rolling up GBP data across locations) Comfortable making decisions and defending them, not just presenting options Nice to Have -Experience working with regulated industries -Experience with eCommerce SEO and third-party storefront optimization (Dutchie, Shopify, BigCommerce) -Agency owner or fractional Head of SEO background Logistics Timeline: 4 weeks from contract start, fully delivered Working time: minimum 4 hours per day overlap with US Eastern Time (9am to 5pm ET) Communication: Slack for daily updates, scheduled video calls for strategy sessions, Loom for asynchronous walkthroughs Start date: within 7 days of contract signing To Apply Generic proposals will not be considered. Your application must include answers to the following: Walk us through a reporting framework you previously built end-to-end for a multi-client agency. What were the client-facing metrics, why those specifically, and what tool did you build it in? Without knowing the full specifics of our use case, which two of our four current tools (SearchAtlas, SE Ranking, Ahrefs, AgencyAnalytics) would you cancel by default for an agency of our size, and why? We have one client with 9 physical locations under one brand. They want one monthly report showing brand-level performance with optional drilldown into individual locations. How would you architect this, and in which tool? What is your hourly rate, and what is your fixed-price quote for the full scope above? Provide links or screenshots of two client reports or reporting frameworks you have built end-to-end. Redact client names if needed. Candidates who pass screening will be invited to a paid 1-hour discovery call before final selection. We are looking to hire and start within 7 days.
jobs.title: Senior SEO Expert: Reporting Strategy & Build for Multi-Client Local SEO Agency

We work with platforms like HubSpot, Capsule, Klaviyo, Ortto and Shopify, and we're known for being hands-on, practical and jargon-free. We're a small team of experienced operators and we're growing. What you'll be doing Building emails in Klaviyo, Ortto and HubSpot Supporting CRM implementation projects (and leading smaller ones like a Capsule setup for a 5–10 person team) Assisting with automation flows, list management and platform configuration QA and testing across client projects What we're looking for 1–2 years experience in CRM, email marketing or marketing automation Hands-on with at least one of: Klaviyo, HubSpot, Ortto or Capsule Detail-oriented, clear communicator, reliable remote worker Based in Australia or New Zealand Tell us about your background and one platform you're confident in.
